individuals.name: Benjamin Franklin
individuals.description: "Well done is better than well said."

individuals.name: Charlie Munger
individuals.description: "Show me the incentive, and I'll show you the outcome."

individuals.name: Leonardo da Vinci
individuals.description: "Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication."

individuals.name: Rick Rubin
individuals.description: "The audience comes last."

individuals.name: Thomas Edison
individuals.description: "I have not failed. I've just found 1,000 ways that won't work."

individuals.name: Daniel Kahneman
individuals.description: "We can be blind to the obvious, and we are also blind to our blindness."

individuals.name: Dean Smith
individuals.description: “A team is not a group of people who play together. A team is a group of people who trust each other.”

individuals.name: Marcus Aurelius
individuals.description: "You have power over your mind, not outside events.  Realize this, and you will find strength."

individuals.name: Elon Musk
individuals.description: "The best part is no part."

individuals.name: Dave Matthews
individuals.description: "Take these chances, place them in a box until a quieter time, lights down you up and die.

individuals.name: Danny Meyer
individuals.description: "The road to success is paved with mistakes well handled."

individuals.name: Sir Edmund Hillary
individuals.description: "It is not the mountain we conquer, but ourselves."

individuals.name: Steve Jobs
individuals.description: "Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life."

individuals.name: Michael Jordan
individuals.description: "I have failed over and over and over again in my life.  And that is why I succeed."

individuals.name: Albert Einstein
individuals.description: "Imagination is more important than knowledge."

individuals.name: J.K. Rowling
individuals.description: "It is our choices that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities."

individuals.name: Paul Graham
individuals.description: "There's a kind of excited curiosity that's both the engine and the rudder of great work."

individuals.name: Sir Ernest Shackleton
individuals.description: "Difficulties are just things to overcome, after all."

individuals.name: Howard Marks
individuals.description: "You can't predict. You can prepare."

individuals.name: Phil Knight
individuals.description: "Just do it."

individuals.name: Ray Dalio
individuals.description: "He who lives by the crystal ball will eat shattered glass."

individuals.name: C.S. Lewis
individuals.description: "Humility is not thinking less of yourself, but thinking of yourself less."
